subject: Write platform-specific interview adaptations
description:
Extend the adaptive interview engine with platform-specific questions and prompts for Generic Agent Skills and Codex platforms.

The core interview engine (Phase 1) handles platform-agnostic questions. This task adds questions that surface platform-specific options and considerations:

1. **GAS-specific questions:**
   - Portability requirements across agent implementations
   - Tool integration preferences (MCP, native, etc.)
   - Agent vs skill distinction (does the user need an agent or a skill?)
   - GAS-specific section usage (when to use optional sections)

2. **Codex-specific questions:**
   - Codex environment constraints and capabilities
   - Codex-specific tool availability
   - How the skill fits Codex's execution model
   - Codex-specific formatting preferences

3. **Conditional logic** — Platform-specific questions only appear when that platform is selected as the target

4. **Integration** — Questions fit naturally into the existing interview flow, not as a separate section

**Acceptance Criteria:**

_Functional:_
- [ ] GAS-specific questions added covering portability, tools, structure
- [ ] Codex-specific questions added covering environment, tools, execution model
- [ ] Questions only appear when relevant platform is selected
- [ ] Questions integrate naturally into existing interview flow
- [ ] Responses feed into platform-specific generation

_Edge Cases:_
- [ ] OpenCode users see no additional questions (already handled in Phase 1)
- [ ] Questions adapt to experience level (beginner vs advanced)

_Error Handling:_
- [ ] Unknown platform selection gracefully falls back to generic questions

**Testing Requirements:**
• Manual: Run interview with GAS selected, verify GAS-specific questions appear
• Manual: Run interview with Codex selected, verify Codex-specific questions appear
• Manual: Verify OpenCode interview unchanged from Phase 1

Source: internal/specs/create-skill-SPEC.md Section 9.2

metadata.spec_phase_name: Platform Expansion - Generic Agent Skills & Codex
